blocks.text: Howl is the framework that powers Hushkey. It builds on Fresh 2.x and adds file-system APIs, a single-pass SSR pipeline, and a typed islands runtime — packaged as a single JSR module.

items: File-system routes for both pages and APIs
Single-pass renderToString — ~5ms saved per request vs the dual-pass baseline
Typed defineApi factory with Zod validation, role checks, rate limiting and OpenAPI generation
Tiered cache adapters: memory, Redis, Deno KV

blocks.text: Each .api.ts file becomes a route. The directory is the OpenAPI tag, the path is inferred from the filename.
Auth, rate limiting, caching and response shaping are all handled by the framework — the handler returns a plain object.
Howl now ships every Hushkey deployment, has a published JSR package, and a small but growing user base outside Hushkey itself.
